sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67747" key="mikropolitei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-πολῑτεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">citizenship in a petty state</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.39.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
